# ==============================================================================
# Kronos Swarm Core — backend/requirements.txt
# Runtime dependencies only. Python 3.11+.
# Generated by analysis of the full import graph of app_server.py and all
# modules reachable from it at runtime.
# ==============================================================================

# python-dotenv
# Loaded by backend/config/runtime.py via a try/except ImportError guard.
# On Render, env vars are injected directly, but this package lets the app
# also consume a local .env file for parity across environments.
python-dotenv>=1.0.0,<2.0.0
